sub: Converts videos to .nfv in the browser (no software on your PC) and writes them straight to the Cardputer's SD.
drop:
Drag your videos here — or click to pick them
mp4 · mov · webm · mkv · avi … conversion runs locally in the browser (ffmpeg.wasm)
turbo: Big movie or lots of videos? For native GPU conversion (faster, handles huge files), start the companion on your PC: node tools/nfv/studio.mjs and open it at http://<PC-IP>:5577. Here in the browser it is always available, with nothing to install.
